message:
perf(encoder): use high quality vImage scaling, cap FPS at 30

- Switch to kvImageHighQualityResampling for better image quality when
  downscaling to 1080p
- Cap termweb max FPS at 30 (was 60) to match encoder output capability
- Keep mux server render at 30fps, input polling at 125Hz for responsiveness
- Simplify encoder by removing failed threading experiments
